dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8445 IH: Stop DEI Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Kim (for herself, Mr. Burchett, and Mr. Donalds) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: To prohibit Federal education funds from being made available to schools that consider race, sex, ethnicity, color, or national origin in violation of civil rights laws.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Stop DEI Act.

section.header: Prohibition on considering race, sex, ethnicity, color, or national origin in violation of civil rights laws

subsection.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, no funds may be made available under an applicable program to an institution of higher education that considers race, sex, ethnicity, color, or national origin in ways that violate the Nation’s civil rights laws.

paragraph.text: The term applicable program has the meaning given such term in section 400 of the General Education Provisions Act (20 U.S.C. 1221).
The term institution of higher education has the meaning given such term in section 102 of the Higher Education Act of 1965 (20 U.S.C. 1002).
